category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line tool to send iMessage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name lists the package name as imessage-ruby.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies iMessage sending from the command line; source_facts.name identifies the Ruby package context.
